# `verification-before-completion` (external skill)

**Categoría**: `general`  
**Source**: `~/.claude/skills/verification-before-completion/`  
**Mirrored at**: 2026-05-29T03:15:01+00:00

## Descripción

Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always

## Cómo usar

Skill local del usuario. Para invocarla: `/verification-before-completion` desde Claude Code, o referenciar el path desde un agent runtime que sepa leerlo.

## Human notes

_(no se sobrescribe por automatización)_
